title: aconitum funiculare
intro: Aconitum funiculare, also known as the variegated monk's hood or variegated wolf's bane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include pain relief, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Aconitum funiculare has been known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving arthritis pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or tea, and its roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations, although it is essential to handle the plant with caution due to its toxicity.
